title: brassica perfoliata
intro: Brassica perfoliata, also known as rosinweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mustard family and is native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of rosinweed include its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation in the body. Rosinweed can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and has been traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions and respiratory problems.
